title: dortmanna gaudichaudii
intro: Dortmanna gaudichaudii, also known as sea thrift or thrift, is a low-growing, evergreen flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dortmanna gaudichaudii include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
